personality_one_liner: A professional, clean, and trustworthy medical experience relying on high-contrast blues and crisp structure to ensure patient safety and caregiver confidence.

spacing.rule: Generous vertical rhythm. Minimal touch targets must be 48pt+ (preferably 52pt for seniors/caregivers). Generous padding around cards to avoid medical interface clutter.

do's: Use glass effect on bottom tab bar to maintain context when lists scroll behind.
Use glass on sticky headers, bottom-sheet headers, and modal scrims.
Use over tinted brandTertiary background for the floating SOS button.
dont's: Never blur body content, form fields, or dense medical data rows.
Avoid on critical warning/error modals (use solid surface instead).

screens.name: Splash & Google Login
screens.purpose: Secure authentication gate showcasing the brand trust and tagline.
screens.layout: Full-bleed abstract medical background. Gradient scrim from top (transparent) to bottom (surfaceInverse) >70% opacity. Logo (V checkmark shape) and tagline 'INTELLIGENT. SICHER. MENSCHLICH.' centered. Google login button at the bottom thumb zone.

screens.name: Patient Dashboard
screens.purpose: A quick glance at today's adherence, the next medication dose, and emergency access.

states.loading: Skeleton UI for adherence ring and next dose card
states.empty: Illustration of health and prompt to 'Add first medication'.
states.error: Error loading schedule with retry button

screens.layout: Header: Greeting with role switcher. Hero section: Large 'Next Dose' card displaying time and medication with a primary action 'Confirm Intake'. Below hero: Daily status/adherence ring chart. Floating Action Button (FAB) for SOS.

screens.name: Medikamentenplan (Schedule)
screens.purpose: Vertical timeline of all medications for the day/week.

states.empty: Clear schedule icon, 'No medications scheduled for today.'

screens.layout: Sticky date picker at top (glassmorphism). Timeline view mapping hours. Each row contains medication name, dosage, and status badge (Taken, Missed, Upcoming). Bottom sticky button to 'Add Medication'.

screens.name: Caregiver / Relative View
screens.purpose: Provides caregivers a tile-based overview of multiple patients and rapid alert access.
screens.layout: Patient switcher at the top. Grid of large tiles (52x52 min targets) showing Patient Status, Adherence, Missed Doses Alerts, and recent reports. Focus on high contrast and simple data visualization.

screens.name: Geräte-Status (Device Sync)
screens.purpose: Monitor connection and health of VYLNAX PRO dispenser and VYLNAX Band.
screens.layout: Split view: Top half VYLNAX PRO Dispenser (Water level, Battery, Compartments filled). Bottom half VYLNAX Band (Battery, Connection status). Uses device imagery with gradient backdrops.

splash_background.alt: Abstract clean blue waves for splash screen background

caregiver_banner.alt: Caregiver holding patient's hands, representing the human aspect of care

instructions_to_main_agent: Follow '1 iOS-Native Clean' personality rigorously. Ensure high contrast for elderly patients and caregivers.
Brand Color Override: The prompt explicitly requested 'Blue, White, Dark Blue', thereby lifting the anti-pattern blue ban. Do not substitute blue with near-black. Use the blue hex values specified.
Create a prominent floating SOS button across main screens with a vibrant warning color (orange/red) so it stands out from the clinical blue base.
Implement >52pt touch targets on critical interactions (especially in Caregiver View) to align with healthcare app usability research for seniors.
For the Caregiver dashboard, utilize a tile-based UI layout derived from web research ensuring cognitive ease (no deeper than 2 levels of navigation).
Adherence metrics (Daily ring chart, Weekly bar chart) should use the 'brandPrimary' and 'success' tokens.
Always apply a dark bottom scrim to the splash_background image before overlaying white text to ensure readability.
Device Sync screen should display two main cards, one for the VYLNAX PRO Dispenser and one for the Band, showing simulated hardware metrics (battery, compartment status).
